modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer is displaying error and printing random characters.

full_description_text: The HP Laserjet printer is acting up during a print job. It's spitting out random characters and extra pages filled with error messages. The user mentioned seeing an error code 46.FF04 and was advised to turn it off and on. There was also some confusing info about POST requests that seemed irrelevant.
short_description: Printer is displaying error and printing random characters.
description: The HP Laserjet printer is acting up during a print job. It's spitting out random characters and extra pages filled with error messages. The user mentioned seeing an error code 46.FF04 and was advised to turn it off and on. There was also some confusing info about POST requests that seemed irrelevant.
